logic.AKT_H: AKT_B & p110_H & PI3K_H & PIP3 & PDK1 & mTORC2 & Ras
logic.FoxO3: !(AKT_B | AKT_H | ERK) | (!(AKT_H & (Plk1 | Plk1_H | AKT_B | ERK)) & !(Plk1 & Plk1_H & ERK))
logic.CyclinD1: !CHK1 & ((!p21 & ((!GSK3 & (Myc | E2F1)) | (Myc & CyclinD1) | (Myc & E2F1) | (E2F1 & CyclinD1))) | (!pRB & E2F1 & ((Myc & CyclinD1) | (Myc & !GSK3) | (CyclinD1 & !GSK3))))
logic.CyclinE: E2F1 & Cdc6 & Pre_RC & !(pRB | p27Kip1 | CHK1 | Casp3)
logic.BCL2: !(Casp3 | BAD | BIM | BIK) & (!U_Kinetochores | (MCL_1 & BCLXL) | (Plk1 & (BCLXL | MCL_1 | !(Cdk1 & CyclinB))))
logic.BAD: Casp3 | !(AKT_H | AKT_B | ERK | S6K) | (Casp8 & !(AKT_B & ERK & S6K) & !(AKT_H & (AKT_B | ERK)))
